mechanics.name_guess: My vest had stopped the shot, though the
mechanics.breadcrumb_path: Rules Compendium > Page 013 > items > My vest had stopped the shot, though the
mechanics.excerpt: My vest had stopped the shot, though the hard twinge of pain with each breath warned of cracked rib_ Lying on my back_ staring up into the rafters of the bay; saw Stephen take two rounds The first jerked his leg back_ spinning him around_ The second grazed his arm and tore it loose from its steadying hold on the tether: He spun out of con- trol , his SMG slipping from his grip and dropping down onto the low wall of battered and abused crates give Stephen this much_he rarely hesitates Having lost his weapon and taken disabling hit, it was no doubt mat ter of seconds before the fire directed against us swept in and hammered him mercilessly into bleeding corpse His good hand went to his shoulder and came away with knife that flashed out once, severing the tether ana dropping him meters to unyielding ferrocrete_ heard bones break with sickening snaps.
